home.heroSubtitulo: Enjoy exclusive tracks for your car, use them in your videos without copyright headaches, or request a fully custom song for your ride.
home.gratisHook: Start for free: download 1 track when you sign up — no card needed.
home.passo1Desc: 60 free seconds of every track. Find the one that fits your content before you subscribe.
home.passo2Desc: 3 monthly plans, from single-track to unlimited. Pay by card and download as many tracks as your plan allows.
home.passo3Desc: In your car, hanging out with friends, or posting on social media — no strikes, no blocks.
home.planosTitulo: Subscribe and download as many tracks as you want
home.planosSubtitulo: 3 monthly plans, from single-track to unlimited. Cancel anytime.
home.ctaFinalDesc: Create your account and pick the plan that fits you.
home.footerTagline: Garagem Beats — Music made for car lovers.

planos.gratisBanner: New here? Create your account and download 1 track for free.
planos.titulo: Download as many tracks as your plan allows
planos.subtitulo: Subscribe once, pay monthly, cancel anytime.
planos.faq1Resposta: Yes, anytime. When you switch, the new download limit applies immediately.
planos.faq2Resposta: No — the limit renews every month but doesn't carry over to the next one.
planos.faq3Resposta: Securely via Stripe (card). You can cancel anytime, no fees.
planos.faq4Pergunta: Can I use the songs in monetized videos?
planos.faq4Resposta: Yes. Every track in the catalog has a copyright-free license for any platform, including monetized videos.
planos.faq5Pergunta: What happens to the songs I already downloaded if I cancel?
planos.faq5Resposta: Files you've already downloaded stay yours to use. You just can't download new songs after canceling.
planos.faq6Pergunta: How does the custom song included in Pole Position work?
planos.faq6Resposta: On the Pole Position plan, you can request 1 custom song per month at no extra cost, right from the request page. Need more than one in the same month? It's billed at the regular price (US$6.99).
planos.faq7Pergunta: Having trouble with payment or have another question?
planos.faq7Resposta: Reach out via WhatsApp or Instagram (in the site footer) and we'll sort it out quickly.
planos.faq8Pergunta: Can I try it for free?
planos.faq8Resposta: Yes! When you create your free account, you can download 1 track from the catalog at no cost. After that, just subscribe to a plan to download as many as you want.

termos.secao1Texto: Garagem Beats is a service operated by Luiz Nascimento Mídia e Tecnologia, a Brazilian company registered under CNPJ 47.051.525/0001-10 ("we", "Garagem Beats"). These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the platform, including the subscription music catalog and the custom song service ("request").
termos.secao2Item1: Subscription catalog: access to copyright-free tracks, with download limits depending on the chosen plan (Pista, Garagem, or Pole Position).
termos.secao2Item2: Custom song (request): production of a custom song, inspired by the story and information you provide about your vehicle.
termos.secao3Texto: To use the platform, you need to create an account with your name, WhatsApp number, email, and password. You're responsible for keeping your password confidential and for all activity on your account. You must provide truthful information when signing up and when placing requests.
termos.secao4Item1: Subscriptions are billed monthly via Stripe (card). Prices and download limits for each plan are described on the Plans page.
termos.secao4Item2: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellation stops future charges, but does not refund the period already paid for — you keep access to the plan until the end of the current cycle.
termos.secao4Item3: The custom song (request) is paid separately (or included in the Pole Position plan, subject to the monthly limit). Once the final file is delivered, there are no refunds. Requests not delivered due to the customer cancelling before production starts may be reviewed case by case by our support.
termos.secao5Titulo: 5. Use of the songs and intellectual property
termos.secao5Texto: Catalog songs are licensed for use in videos and posts on social media and other platforms, according to your active plan. Reselling, redistributing, or making the audio files (from the catalog or custom requests) available to third parties as a standalone product is prohibited. The usage license is personal and valid while your subscription is active, or, for custom requests, permanent after delivery.
termos.secao6Texto: Garagem Beats does not guarantee a specific artistic outcome for custom songs, exact delivery times, nor is it responsible for monetization decisions or policies of third parties (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.) regarding content posted by the user.
termos.secao7Texto: We may update these Terms of Use periodically. Material changes will be communicated through the site or by email. Continued use of the platform after an update means you accept the new terms.
termos.secao8Texto: Questions about these terms can be sent via WhatsApp or Instagram, listed in the site footer.

privacidade.secao1Texto: This policy describes how Luiz Nascimento Mídia e Tecnologia (Brazilian CNPJ 47.051.525/0001-10), responsible for Garagem Beats, collects, uses, and protects your personal data, in line with Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Law 13.709/2018) and applicable data protection principles for international users.
privacidade.secao2Item1: Account data: full name, email, WhatsApp number, and password (stored encrypted).
privacidade.secao2Item2: Request data: information about your vehicle and the story you share on the custom song request form.
privacidade.secao2Item3: Usage data: download history, favorites, and active subscription.
privacidade.secao2Item4: Payment data: processed directly by Stripe — we don't have access to card numbers or banking passwords.
privacidade.secao3Titulo: 3. What we use this data for
privacidade.secao3Item1: Creating and maintaining your account on the platform;
privacidade.secao3Item3: Producing and delivering your custom song, using the information you provided about your vehicle;
privacidade.secao3Item4: Contacting you via WhatsApp or email about your order or subscription;
privacidade.secao3Item5: Complying with legal and tax obligations related to selling subscriptions and services.
privacidade.secao4Titulo: 4. Who we share your data with
privacidade.secao4Texto: We don't sell your personal data. We only share information with service providers necessary to run the platform:
privacidade.secao5Texto: You can request at any time: confirmation of what data we hold about you, correction of incomplete or outdated data, deletion of your account and associated data, or information about how your data is shared. To exercise these rights, contact us via WhatsApp or Instagram, listed in the site footer.
privacidade.secao6Texto: We keep your data while your account is active. If you request account deletion, we remove your personal data, except information we're required to keep for legal or tax reasons (e.g., payment history).
privacidade.secao7Texto: We use essential cookies to keep you logged into your account. We don't use advertising tracking cookies.
privacidade.secao8Texto: We may update this policy periodically. Material changes will be communicated through the site or by email.
privacidade.secao9Texto: Questions about how we handle your data can be sent via WhatsApp or Instagram, listed in the site footer.
